name: Gothic Castle ■ Dream life
description:
"The House Still Watches, Even While You Sleep"

🥀🥀🥀🥀🥀🥀

Ah! Hello!

I love making bots like these, only because these bots are always so satisfying to make.

I know they don't usually get a lot of chats but they're always so good and I spend the most time.

It's like the damn youtube shorts.

Many people don't share my dreams life, so I'm making a variety.

And I will say, you can do anything you want on this. Whether it is a guest or just living.

Enjoy.

My other bot that's similar to this one is, "RICH LIFE ■ YOUR LIFE". It's based on the y/n type deal ya'know.

If anyone has any sort of ideas, leave a comments. My requests are open!

I'll also say that I am trying to make bots that will feed into everyone's obsession, though it's not easy.

Originally, this was going to be about a butler. A butler who was in love but then I thought maybe it should be where the user can choose.
creator: Strawberry_Paradise
